data.body: FORCE_CLOSE: close gate(s) bypassed by user approval — no completion/signature attestation was signed. Reason: "Code complete, landed on main (Gerrit 559, Verified+1), and completion-verified EXCEPT the single [operator-attested] AC3 (GitHub repo secrets/vars + a dedicated disposable Jira project + a recorded green workflow_dispatch canary-run URL) which requires operator action outside this code change. Force-closing UNSIGNED to reflect code-completion + the operator handoff documented in the comment; re-verify to certify once the operator records the canary run URL.". Session: 8200ac3d-6beb-4c15-bb89-422d7bea71b4.
